# Provably Fair Basketball

> A free, privacy-first toolkit that helps anyone, especially a parent or teacher who got pulled in to coach, run fair youth basketball tryouts and coach a full season with confidence. No account, no cost, and no student data ever leaves the device.

Provably Fair Basketball is a free web app for youth basketball coaches (middle school and high school). It is built for brand-new and volunteer coaches who may have no basketball background. Everything is designed to be simple enough for a first-time coach and thorough enough to run a real season. It works offline and installs like an app.

## What it does

- **Tryout Evaluation**: Rate players by jersey number across 6 weighted areas (Effort, Coachable, Ball Skills, Footwork, Finishing, Teammate). The app auto-scores and ranks players. Student names are never stored in the app; a paper sheet links numbers to names, so tryouts are objective and student-protective.
- **Start Here**: A 5-step guided path for brand-new coaches (mindset, first practice, tryouts, season plan, talking with parents).
- **Coaching Handbook**: A 12-week season plan, a practice toolkit (90-minute template, drill library, ready-to-run quick sessions), a complete new-coach guide (mindset, age-appropriate development, common coaching traps, checklists), copy-paste parent email templates, and a quick reference for the rating system.

## Who it is for

- New, reluctant, or volunteer youth basketball coaches who need a simple way to start
- Schools and athletic directors who want fair, transparent, student-protective tryouts
- Parents and administrators

## Key pages

- [Home](https://provablyfairbasketball.com/): Overview and entry points
- [Start Here](https://provablyfairbasketball.com/start): Guided path for new coaches
- [Tryout Evaluation](https://provablyfairbasketball.com/tryout): The fair tryout scoring tool
- [Coaching Handbook](https://provablyfairbasketball.com/handbook): Season plan, practices, drills, full guide

## Notes

- Free, with no ads and no upsell. Built and hosted by CPK Solutions (https://cpk.solutions).
- Privacy by design: no student names in the app, no accounts, no tracking, and all data stays on the coach's own device.
